fields.title: SMS Notification
fields.message: Dear Valued Customers, please be advised that there will be a scheduled water supply interruption today, Wednesday, April 29, 2026, from 12 PM to 8 PM to facilitate urgent maintenance on our main distribution lines in the Tabuan zone 5 . We kindly request that you store sufficient water for your essential needs before the noon deadline and ensure all taps are turned off to prevent flooding when the supply returns. Please note that this temporary disruption will not affect your upcoming billing cycle, and any estimated meter readings will be adjusted accordingly once service is fully restored. We sincerely apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your patience as we work to improve the reliability of our water infrastructure.

fields.title: Urgent Notice: Settlement Deadline for Overdue Accounts
fields.message:
This is an important notice to all consumers with overdue and unsettled accounts. We kindly advise that all outstanding balances be settled starting today, and payments must be made within the next three days. Please be aware that any payments made after this period will no longer be valid, and services will be disconnected. To avoid disruption, we urge you to settle your account promptly. Payments can be made through G-Cash , And Paymaya also we accept Cash in the Brgy. Office. If you have any questions or require assistance, please contact our customer service team at 0968-316-7617 or email us at johnmarkomale200@gmail.com.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.
